schema.title: Response Labels Read Label Data Meta
Response Labels Read Fertilizer Label Data Meta

post.description: Extract specified fields (or all fields if none specified) for fertilizer labels.

get.description: List legislations for the given product type.

post.description: Create user without email verification - for testing only.

en.title: En
en.description: The English text verbatim. Leave as null if not present.

fr.title: Fr
fr.description: The French text verbatim. Leave as null if not present.

status.description: Outcome of the check: compliant, non_compliant, not_applicable, or inconclusive (requires human review).

explanation.description: Concise step-by-step reasoning citing specific evidence from the Label Data that supports or contradicts the regulation's requirements.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: List of contact information (manufacturer, distributor, etc.)

registration_number.title: Registration Number
registration_number.description: Registration number of the product itself (not its individual ingredients).

registration_claim.description: Verbatim text where the product claims to be registered, even if no registration number is present.

exemption_claim.description: Verbatim claim of registration exemption (e.g., Section 18 mixture claims).

examples.en: All ingredients in this mixture are registered

country_of_origin.title: Country Of Origin
country_of_origin.description: Country where the product was manufactured or from which it was imported.

product_classification.description: Classify the product. 'fertilizer': contains N/P/K or plant food, sold as plant nutrient. 'supplement': improves soil or aids growth, but is not a fertilizer. 'growing_medium': a medium (e.g., potting mix) containing fertilizers/supplements. 'treated_seed': seeds treated with fertilizers/supplements.

customer_formula_statements.title: Customer Formula Statements
customer_formula_statements.description: A 'customer formula fertilizer' is a fertilizer prepared to the specifications of the purchaser and sold only to that purchaser. Extract verbatim text identifying the product as such, including the purchaser's name or any signature references.

intended_use_statements.title: Intended Use Statements
intended_use_statements.description: Verbatim statements indicating intended use or target audience.

processing_instruction_statements.title: Processing Instruction Statements
processing_instruction_statements.description: Verbatim statements indicating the product requires further treatment, other than simple mixing or repackaging.

examples.en: For use as an ingredient in XYZ manufacture

experimental_statements.title: Experimental Statements
experimental_statements.description: Verbatim statements indicating the product is for experimental, research, or trial purposes, including instructions to destroy the product or plants upon completion.

examples.en: Residual product and plants must be destroyed after trial

export_statements.title: Export Statements
export_statements.description: Verbatim statements indicating that the product is not intended for sale or use in Canada and is intended for export only.

examples.en: Not for sale or use in Canada

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.description: Source materials or compounds the product is made from. This is NOT the guaranteed analysis section.

guaranteed_analysis.description: The guaranteed nutrient declaration section, usually under a header like 'Guaranteed Analysis' or 'Analyse Garantie'. This is NOT the ingredient list.

examples.en: Keep out of reach of children

field_names.title: Field Names
field_names.description: List of field names to extract. If None or empty, extract all fields.

is_minimum.title: Is Minimum
is_minimum.description: True if title contains 'Minimum', false otherwise

nutrients.title: Nutrients
nutrients.description: List of nutrients with bilingual names, values and units

is_minimum.title: Is Minimum
is_minimum.description: True if title contains 'Minimum', false otherwise

nutrients.title: Nutrients
nutrients.description: List of nutrients with bilingual names, values and units

registration_number.title: Registration Number
registration_number.description: Registration number of the product itself (not its individual ingredients).
